# infra/pgbouncer/userlist.txt — DEV-ONLY credentials
#
# Format: "username" "password-or-SCRAM-secret"
#
# These are matched against PATRONI_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD in
# docker-compose.meta-ha.yml. For production, this file is generated
# from Vault secrets at deploy time; never hand-edit prod userlist.txt.
#
# When SVID-based mTLS lands (V1+30d alongside service mesh decision
# Q-L7-3), this file becomes empty + Postgres uses pg_ident.conf to map
# SVIDs to roles. Until then, scram-sha-256 hashed shared secrets is fine.

# Dev superuser (matches docker-compose default).
"postgres" "postgres"

# Pgbouncer admin / stats users.
"pgbouncer_admin" "admin"
"pgbouncer_stats" "stats"
